Based on the latest search results, here are the top AI news headlines for today (April 9, 2026):

## Major AI News Headlines

**Meta Launches Muse Spark AI Model**

citations.cited_text: Meta debuted its first major AI model, Muse Spark, spearheaded by chief AI officer Alexandr Wang, who joined nine months ago and leads Meta Superintel...
citations.title: Meta debuts new AI model, attempting to catch Google, OpenAI after spending billions

content.text: Meta debuted its first major AI model, Muse Spark, spearheaded by chief AI officer Alexandr Wang, who joined nine months ago and leads Meta Superintelligence Labs.

citations.cited_text: Their most powerful AI model yet, rolling out across WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Messenger, and AI glasses.
citations.title: AI News. April 9, 2026 - by Crypto Integrated

content.text: The model is rolling out across WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Messenger, and AI glasses.

*Source: CNBC*

**OpenClaw v2026.4.9 Released with New Features**

citations.cited_text: ... OpenClaw v2026.4.9 shipped with memory/dreaming upgrades, SSRF and node exec injection hardening, character-vibes QA evals, and an Android pairing...
citations.title: AI News. April 9, 2026 - by Crypto Integrated

content.text: OpenClaw v2026.4.9 shipped with memory/dreaming upgrades, SSRF and node exec injection hardening, character-vibes QA evals, and an Android pairing overhaul.

*Source: Crypto Integrated*

**Agentic Risk Standard (ARS) Framework Launched**

citations.cited_text: Researchers from Google DeepMind, Microsoft, Columbia, and others launched the Agentic Risk Standard (ARS) a framework for escrow, underwriting, and c...
citations.title: AI News. April 9, 2026 - by Crypto Integrated

content.text: Researchers from Google DeepMind, Microsoft, Columbia, and others launched the Agentic Risk Standard (ARS) a framework for escrow, underwriting, and collateral when AI agents transact autonomously. Simulations showed up to 61% reduction in user losses.

*Source: Crypto Integrated*

**Google Integrates NotebookLM into Gemini**

citations.cited_text: ... Google integrated NotebookLM directly into Gemini, letting users manage notebooks and use Gemini chats as sources, rolling out to paid tiers first...
citations.title: AI News. April 9, 2026 - by Crypto Integrated

content.text: Google integrated NotebookLM directly into Gemini, letting users manage notebooks and use Gemini chats as sources, rolling out to paid tiers first.

*Source: Crypto Integrated*
